name: Google Workspace Active Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects active google_workspace accounts that do not meet MFA requirements.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name FROM google_workspace_users u WHERE 1=1 AND (COALESCE(u.is_enrolled_in_2sv, false) = false OR COALESCE(u.is_enforced_in_2sv, false) = false)
remediation: Require MFA enrollment and enforcement for all active accounts.
